name: Victory Tower
researchNote: No building named Victory Tower exists in Rockville, MD. The only Victory Tower in the region is managed by Victory Housing Inc / Quantum Property Management in Takoma Park. It is a 12-story HUD-subsidized senior community (ages 62+, income-restricted at 50% AMI). It does not have 2BR units, a pool, balconies, or doorman service. The Victory Housing corporate office is in Rockville at 6001 Executive Blvd, which may be the source of the Rockville association.
approxRentRange: Income-based (HUD 50% AMI); market rent not applicable
bathroomsNote: Units are efficiency and 1BR only; no 2BR units in this building
